title: stipecoma macrocalyx
intro: Stipecoma macrocalyx is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stipecoma macrocalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies, fever, and skin conditions. Stipecoma macrocalyx is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
